prompt: Create a photorealistic fashion portrait of a young blonde woman with a shoulder-length bob standing on a bridge or riverside railing in Paris at golden hour. She faces the camera with a soft confident smile, wearing thin round eyeglasses, a crisp white button-down blouse with a slightly open collar, a glossy black patent leather trench coat, a high-waisted glossy black patent leather mini skirt, and sheer black tights. Her left arm rests casually on a metal railing while her right arm hangs naturally, upper-body three-quarter framing from mid-thigh upward. The background shows the Seine river with shimmering sunset reflections, classic Haussmann buildings on the left, an arched bridge, and the Eiffel Tower softly blurred in the distance on the right. Use warm sunset backlighting, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, cinematic bokeh, high-fashion editorial styling, sharp focus on the face and shiny black vinyl textures, natural proportions, no text, no watermark.
